title: fragaria vesca var. mexicana
intro: Fragaria vesca var. mexicana, also known as the Mexican Woodland Strawberry, is a subspecies of the wild strawberry plant that is native to Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. mexicana include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
